task_description: Scrape authoritative Beyblade X sources and fix the parts database seed data (prisma/data/meta-parts.ts) with comprehensive, correctly-attributed Hasbro and Takara Tomy parts

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly. Module loads with 261 total parts (168 blades, 36 ratchets, 57 bits). Zero slug duplicates. Manufacturer attributions verified: 9 Hasbro-exclusive blades, 252 TT parts. All ratchet-integrated blades properly flagged. Series inference validated. Review issues addressed: Glory Valkyrie duplicate removed, Hover Wyvern/WyvernHover collision resolved, cross-array ratchet dependency documented, Stag/Bucks duplicate removed, Glory Valk ratchetIntegration fixed.
